<content>1: // ─── Chat Store ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
2: // Manages chat messages, streaming state, and processing.
3: 
4: import type {
5: 	AssistantMessage,
6: 	ChatMessage,
7: 	RelayMessage,
8: 	ResultMessage,
9: 	SystemMessage,
10: 	ThinkingMessage,
11: 	ToolMessage,
12: 	UserMessage,
13: } from "../types.js";
14: import { generateUuid } from "../utils/format.js";
15: import { renderMarkdown } from "../utils/markdown.js";
16: 
17: // ─── State ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
18: 
19: export const chatState = $state({
20: 	messages: [] as ChatMessage[],
21: 	/** Raw text of the currently streaming assistant message. */
22: 	currentAssistantText: "",
23: 	/** Whether the LLM is currently generating. */
24: 	processing: false,
25: 	/** Tracks whether we're mid-stream (assistant message not yet finalized). */
26: 	streaming: false,
27: 	/** True during event replay (session switch). Suppresses streaming animations. */
28: 	replaying: false,
29: });
30: 
31: // ─── Derived getters ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
32: 
33: /** Get the number of messages in current conversation. */
34: export function getMessageCount(): number {
35: 	return chatState.messages.length;
36: }
37: 
38: // ─── Internal state (not reactive — used for debouncing) ────────────────────
39: 
40: let renderTimer: ReturnType<typeof setTimeout> | null = null;
41: let thinkingStartTime = 0;
42: 
43: /** Map tool IDs to their message UUIDs for updates. */
44: const toolUuidMap = new Map<string, string>();
45: 
46: // ─── Message handlers ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────
47: 
48: export function handleDelta(
49: 	msg: Extract<RelayMessage, { type: "delta" }>,
50: ): void {
51: 	const { text, messageId } = msg;
52: 
53: 	// If no current assistant message, create one
54: 	if (!chatState.streaming) {
55: 		const uuid = generateUuid();
56: 		const assistantMsg: AssistantMessage = {
57: 			type: "assistant",
58: 			uuid,
59: 			rawText: "",
60: 			html: "",
61: 			finalized: false,
62: 			messageId,
63: 		};
64: 		chatState.messages = [...chatState.messages, assistantMsg];
65: 		chatState.streaming = true;
66: 		chatState.currentAssistantText = "";
67: 	}
68: 
69: 	chatState.currentAssistantText += text;
70: 
71: 	// Debounced markdown render (80ms)
72: 	if (renderTimer !== null) clearTimeout(renderTimer);
73: 	renderTimer = setTimeout(() => {
74: 		renderTimer = null;
75: 		flushAssistantRender();
76: 	}, 80);
77: }
78: 
79: export function handleThinkingStart(
80: 	_msg: Extract<RelayMessage, { type: "thinking_start" }>,
81: ): void {
82: 	thinkingStartTime = Date.now();
83: 	const uuid = generateUuid();
84: 	const thinkingMsg: ThinkingMessage = {
85: 		type: "thinking",
86: 		uuid,
87: 		text: "",
88: 		done: false,
89: 	};
90: 	chatState.messages = [...chatState.messages, thinkingMsg];
91: }
92: 
93: export function handleThinkingDelta(
94: 	msg: Extract<RelayMessage, { type: "thinking_delta" }>,
95: ): void {
96: 	const { text } = msg;
97: 
98: 	// Find the last thinking message and append
99: 	const messages = [...chatState.messages];
100: 	for (let i = messages.length - 1; i >= 0; i--) {
101: 		const m = messages[i]!;
102: 		if (m.type === "thinking" && !(m as ThinkingMessage).done) {
103: 			messages[i] = {
104: 				...(m as ThinkingMessage),
105: 				text: (m as ThinkingMessage).text + text,
106: 			};
107: 			chatState.messages = messages;
108: 			return;
109: 		}
110: 	}
111: }
112: 
113: export function handleThinkingStop(
114: 	_msg: Extract<RelayMessage, { type: "thinking_stop" }>,
115: ): void {
116: 	const duration = thinkingStartTime > 0 ? Date.now() - thinkingStartTime : 0;
117: 	thinkingStartTime = 0;
118: 
119: 	const messages = [...chatState.messages];
120: 	for (let i = messages.length - 1; i >= 0; i--) {
121: 		const m = messages[i]!;
122: 		if (m.type === "thinking" && !(m as ThinkingMessage).done) {
123: 			messages[i] = {
124: 				...(m as ThinkingMessage),
125: 				done: true,
126: 				duration,
127: 			};
128: 			chatState.messages = messages;
129: 			return;
130: 		}
131: 	}
132: }
133: 
134: export function handleToolStart(
135: 	msg: Extract<RelayMessage, { type: "tool_start" }>,
136: ): void {
137: 	const { id, name, messageId } = msg;
138: 	const uuid = generateUuid();
139: 
140: 	toolUuidMap.set(id, uuid);
141: 
142: 	const toolMsg: ToolMessage = {
143: 		type: "tool",
144: 		uuid,
145: 		id,
146: 		name: name || "unknown",
147: 		status: "pending",
148: 		messageId,
149: 	};
150: 	chatState.messages = [...chatState.messages, toolMsg];
151: }
152: 
153: export function handleToolExecuting(
154: 	msg: Extract<RelayMessage, { type: "tool_executing" }>,
155: ): void {
156: 	const { id } = msg;
157: 	const uuid = toolUuidMap.get(id);
158: 	if (!uuid) return;
159: 
160: 	const messages = [...chatState.messages];
161: 	const idx = messages.findIndex((m) => m.type === "tool" && m.uuid === uuid);
162: 	if (idx >= 0) {
163: 		messages[idx] = { ...(messages[idx] as ToolMessage), status: "running" };
164: 		chatState.messages = messages;
165: 	}
166: }
167: 
168: export function handleToolResult(
169: 	msg: Extract<RelayMessage, { type: "tool_result" }>,
170: ): void {
171: 	const { id, content, is_error } = msg;
172: 	const uuid = toolUuidMap.get(id);
173: 	if (!uuid) return;
174: 
175: 	const messages = [...chatState.messages];
176: 	const idx = messages.findIndex((m) => m.type === "tool" && m.uuid === uuid);
177: 	if (idx >= 0) {
178: 		messages[idx] = {
179: 			...(messages[idx] as ToolMessage),
180: 			status: is_error ? "error" : "completed",
181: 			result: content ?? undefined,
182: 			isError: is_error ?? false,
183: 		};
184: 		chatState.messages = messages;
185: 	}
186: }
187: 
188: export function handleResult(
189: 	msg: Extract<RelayMessage, { type: "result" }>,
190: ): void {
191: 	const uuid = generateUuid();
192: 	const { usage, cost, duration } = msg;
193: 	const resultMsg: ResultMessage = {
194: 		type: "result",
195: 		uuid,
196: 		cost,
197: 		duration,
198: 		inputTokens: usage?.input,
199: 		outputTokens: usage?.output,
200: 		cacheRead: usage?.cache_read,
201: 		cacheWrite: usage?.cache_creation,
202: 	};
203: 	chatState.messages = [...chatState.messages, resultMsg];
204: }
205: 
206: export function handleDone(
207: 	_msg: Extract<RelayMessage, { type: "done" }>,
208: ): void {
209: 	// Flush any pending render
210: 	if (renderTimer !== null) {
211: 		clearTimeout(renderTimer);
212: 		renderTimer = null;
213: 	}
214: 
215: 	// Finalize the assistant message
216: 	if (chatState.streaming) {
217: 		flushAssistantRender();
218: 		const messages = [...chatState.messages];
219: 		for (let i = messages.length - 1; i >= 0; i--) {
220: 			const m = messages[i]!;
221: 			if (m.type === "assistant" && !(m as AssistantMessage).finalized) {
222: 				messages[i] = {
223: 					...(m as AssistantMessage),
224: 					finalized: true,
225: 				};
226: 				chatState.messages = messages;
227: 				break;
228: 			}
229: 		}
230: 	}
231: 
232: 	chatState.streaming = false;
233: 	chatState.processing = false;
234: 	chatState.currentAssistantText = "";
235: 	toolUuidMap.clear();
236: }
237: 
238: export function handleStatus(
239: 	msg: Extract<RelayMessage, { type: "status" }>,
240: ): void {
241: 	if (msg.status === "processing") {
242: 		chatState.processing = true;
243: 	}
244: }
245: 
246: export function handleError(
247: 	msg: Extract<RelayMessage, { type: "error" }>,
248: ): void {
249: 	const { code, message } = msg;
250: 
251: 	if (code === "RETRY") {
252: 		// Subtle retry message
253: 		addSystemMessage(message, "info");
254: 	} else {
255: 		// Prominent error
256: 		addSystemMessage(message, "error");
257: 		chatState.processing = false;
258: 		chatState.streaming = false;
259: 	}
260: }
261: 
262: // ─── Actions ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
263: 
264: /** Add a user message to the chat. */
265: export function addUserMessage(text: string, images?: string[]): void {
266: 	const uuid = generateUuid();
267: 	const msg: UserMessage = { type: "user", uuid, text, images };
268: 	chatState.messages = [...chatState.messages, msg];
269: }
270: 
271: /** Add a system message to the chat. */
272: export function addSystemMessage(
273: 	text: string,
274: 	variant: "info" | "error" = "info",
275: ): void {
276: 	const uuid = generateUuid();
277: 	const msg: SystemMessage = { type: "system", uuid, text, variant };
278: 	chatState.messages = [...chatState.messages, msg];
279: }
280: 
281: /** Reset all chat state (for stories/tests). Alias for clearMessages. */
282: export const resetChatState = clearMessages;
283: 
284: /**
285:  * Flush any pending debounced assistant render immediately.
286:  * Called after replaying events so mid-stream content is visible.
287:  */
288: export function flushPendingRender(): void {
289: 	if (renderTimer !== null) {
290: 		clearTimeout(renderTimer);
291: 		renderTimer = null;
292: 	}
293: 	flushAssistantRender();
294: }
295: 
296: /** Clear all messages (e.g. on session switch). */
297: export function clearMessages(): void {
298: 	chatState.messages = [];
299: 	chatState.currentAssistantText = "";
300: 	chatState.streaming = false;
301: 	chatState.processing = false;
302: 	toolUuidMap.clear();
303: 	if (renderTimer !== null) {
304: 		clearTimeout(renderTimer);
305: 		renderTimer = null;
306: 	}
307: }
308: 
309: // ─── Part/message removal handlers ───────────────────────────────────────────
310: 
311: export function handlePartRemoved(
312: 	msg: Extract<RelayMessage, { type: "part_removed" }>,
313: ): void {
314: 	const { partId } = msg;
315: 	if (!partId) return;
316: 	chatState.messages = chatState.messages.filter(
317: 		(m) => m.type !== "tool" || (m as ToolMessage).id !== partId,
318: 	);
319: }
320: 
321: export function handleMessageRemoved(
322: 	msg: Extract<RelayMessage, { type: "message_removed" }>,
323: ): void {
324: 	const { messageId } = msg;
325: 	if (!messageId) return;
326: 	chatState.messages = chatState.messages.filter(
327: 		(m) =>
328: 			!("messageId" in m) ||
329: 			(m as AssistantMessage | ToolMessage).messageId !== messageId,
330: 	);
331: }
332: 
333: // ─── Internal helpers ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────
334: 
335: /** Flush the current assistant text to the last assistant message's HTML. */
336: function flushAssistantRender(): void {
337: 	if (!chatState.currentAssistantText) return;
338: 
339: 	const html = renderMarkdown(chatState.currentAssistantText);
340: 	const messages = [...chatState.messages];
341: 
342: 	for (let i = messages.length - 1; i >= 0; i--) {
343: 		const m = messages[i]!;
344: 		if (m.type === "assistant" && !(m as AssistantMessage).finalized) {
345: 			messages[i] = {
346: 				...(m as AssistantMessage),
347: 				rawText: chatState.currentAssistantText,
348: 				html,
349: 			};
350: 			chatState.messages = messages;
351: 			return;
352: 		}
353: 	}
354: }

85: // ─── State ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
86: 
87: let _ws: WebSocket | null = null;
88: let _reconnectTimer: ReturnType<typeof setTimeout> | null = null;
89: 
90: const RECONNECT_DELAY_MS = 2000;
91: 
92: export const wsState = $state({
93: 	status: "" as ConnectionStatus,
94: 	statusText: "",
95: });
96: 
97: // ─── Derived getters ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
98: 
99: /** Get whether the WebSocket is connected. */
100: export function getIsConnected(): boolean {
101: 	return wsState.status === "connected" || wsState.status === "processing";
102: }
103: 
104: // ─── Core functions ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
105: 
106: /** Send a JSON message over the WebSocket. */
107: export function wsSend(data: Record<string, unknown>): void {
108: 	if (_ws && _ws.readyState === WebSocket.OPEN) {
109: 		_ws.send(JSON.stringify(data));
110: 	}
111: }
112: 
113: /** Set connection status with tooltip text. */
114: function setStatus(status: ConnectionStatus, text: string): void {
115: 	wsState.status = status;
116: 	wsState.statusText = text;
117: }
118: 
119: // ─── Connection lifecycle ───────────────────────────────────────────────────
120: 
121: /** Connect callbacks — called after connection established. */
122: let _onConnectFn: (() => void) | null = null;
123: let _onDisconnectFn: (() => void) | null = null;
124: 
125: export function onConnect(fn: () => void): void {
126: 	_onConnectFn = fn;
127: }
128: 
129: export function onDisconnect(fn: () => void): void {
130: 	_onDisconnectFn = fn;
131: }
132: 
133: /** Current slug — stored for auto-reconnect so it reconnects to the right project. */
134: let _currentSlug: string | undefined;
135: 
136: /** Establish WebSocket connection with auto-reconnect. */
137: export function connect(slug?: string): void {
138: 	_currentSlug = slug;
139: 
140: 	if (_ws) {
141: 		// Remove event listeners to prevent the old socket's close handler
142: 		// from interfering with the new connection (race condition fix).
143: 		const oldWs = _ws;
144: 		_ws = null;
145: 		oldWs.close();
146: 	}
147: 
148: 	if (_reconnectTimer) {
149: 		clearTimeout(_reconnectTimer);
150: 		_reconnectTimer = null;
151: 	}
152: 
153: 	const protocol = window.location.protocol === "https:" ? "wss:" : "ws:";
154: 	const path = slug ? `/p/${slug}/ws` : "/ws";
155: 	const url = `${protocol}//${window.location.host}${path}`;
156: 
157: 	const ws = new WebSocket(url);
158: 	_ws = ws;
159: 
160: 	ws.addEventListener("open", () => {
161: 		// Guard: only act if this is still the current socket
162: 		if (_ws !== ws) return;
163: 		setStatus("connected", "Connected");
164: 		_onConnectFn?.();
165: 	});
166: 
167: 	ws.addEventListener("close", () => {
168: 		// Guard: only act if this is still the current socket.
169: 		// If connect() was called again, _ws points to the new socket
170: 		// and we must not null it or start a reconnect timer.
171: 		if (_ws !== ws) return;
172: 
173: 		setStatus("disconnected", "Disconnected");
174: 		_ws = null;
175: 
176: 		// Reset chat streaming/processing state so UI isn't stuck
177: 		chatState.streaming = false;
178: 		chatState.processing = false;
179: 
180: 		_onDisconnectFn?.();
181: 
182: 		// Auto-reconnect (use stored slug so we reconnect to the right project)
183: 		if (_reconnectTimer) clearTimeout(_reconnectTimer);
184: 		_reconnectTimer = setTimeout(() => {
185: 			_reconnectTimer = null;
186: 			connect(_currentSlug);
187: 		}, RECONNECT_DELAY_MS);
188: 	});
189: 
190: 	ws.addEventListener("error", () => {
191: 		if (_ws !== ws) return;
192: 		setStatus("error", "Connection error");
193: 	});
194: 
195: 	ws.addEventListener("message", (event) => {
196: 		if (_ws !== ws) return;
197: 		try {
198: 			const msg = JSON.parse(event.data) as RelayMessage;
199: 			handleMessage(msg);
200: 		} catch {
201: 			console.warn("[ws] Failed to parse message:", event.data);
202: 		}
203: 	});
204: }
205: 
206: /** Disconnect and stop reconnecting. */
207: export function disconnect(): void {
208: 	if (_reconnectTimer) {
209: 		clearTimeout(_reconnectTimer);
210: 		_reconnectTimer = null;
211: 	}
212: 	if (_ws) {
213: 		_ws.close();
214: 		_ws = null;
215: 	}
216: 	setStatus("disconnected", "Disconnected");
217: }

219: // ─── Centralized message dispatch ───────────────────────────────────────────
220: 
221: /**
222:  * Route an incoming WebSocket message to the appropriate store handler.
223:  * Replaces the vanilla handler registry pattern.
224:  */
225: export function handleMessage(msg: RelayMessage): void {
226: 	switch (msg.type) {
227: 		// ─── Chat / Streaming ────────────────────────────────────────────
228: 		case "delta":
229: 			handleDelta(msg);
230: 			break;
231: 		case "thinking_start":
232: 			handleThinkingStart(msg);
233: 			break;
234: 		case "thinking_delta":
235: 			handleThinkingDelta(msg);
236: 			break;
237: 		case "thinking_stop":
238: 			handleThinkingStop(msg);
239: 			break;
240: 		case "tool_start":
241: 			handleToolStart(msg);
242: 			break;
243: 		case "tool_executing":
244: 			handleToolExecuting(msg);
245: 			break;
246: 		case "tool_result":
247: 			handleToolResult(msg);
248: 			break;
249: 		case "result":
250: 			handleResult(msg);
251: 			break;
252: 		case "done":
253: 			handleDone(msg);
254: 			triggerNotifications(msg);
255: 			break;
256: 		case "status":
257: 			handleStatus(msg);
258: 			break;
259: 		case "error":
260: 			handleChatError(msg);
261: 			triggerNotifications(msg);
262: 			break;
263: 
264: 		// ─── Sessions ────────────────────────────────────────────────────
265: 		case "session_list":
266: 			handleSessionList(msg);
267: 			break;
268: 		case "session_switched":
269: 			console.debug(
270: 				`[ws] session_switched id=${msg.id} events=${Array.isArray(msg.events) ? msg.events.length : "none"} history=${msg.history ? "yes" : "no"}`,
271: 			);
272: 			handleSessionSwitched(msg);
273: 			clearMessages();
274: 
275: 			// Reset HistoryView synchronously BEFORE dispatching new data.
276: 			// This replaces the $effect in HistoryView that was racing with
277: 			// handleHistoryPage (the $effect fired in a microtask AFTER data
278: 			// was loaded, wiping it).
279: 			for (const fn of historyPageListeners) {
280: 				fn({ type: "history_reset" });
281: 			}
282: 
283: 			if (msg.events) {
284: 				// Cache hit: replay raw events through existing chat handlers
285: 				// (full fidelity — same code paths as live streaming)
286: 				replayEvents(msg.events);
287: 			} else if (msg.history) {
288: 				// REST API fallback: dispatch structured messages to HistoryView
289: 				for (const fn of historyPageListeners) {
290: 					fn({
291: 						type: "history_page",
292: 						sessionId: msg.id,
293: 						messages: msg.history.messages,
294: 						hasMore: msg.history.hasMore,
295: 						total: msg.history.total,
296: 					});
297: 				}
298: 			}
299: 			break;
300: 
301: 		// ─── Terminal / PTY ──────────────────────────────────────────────
302: 		case "pty_list":
303: 			handlePtyList(msg);
304: 			break;
305: 		case "pty_created":
306: 			handlePtyCreated(msg);
307: 			break;
308: 		case "pty_output":
309: 			handlePtyOutput(msg);
310: 			break;
311: 		case "pty_exited":
312: 			handlePtyExited(msg);
313: 			break;
314: 		case "pty_deleted":
315: 			handlePtyDeleted(msg);
316: 			break;
317: 
318: 		// ─── Discovery ───────────────────────────────────────────────────
319: 		case "agent_list":
320: 			handleAgentList(msg);
321: 			break;
322: 		case "model_list":
323: 			handleModelList(msg);
324: 			break;
325: 		case "model_info":
326: 			handleModelInfo(msg);
327: 			break;
328: 		case "command_list":
329: 			handleCommandList(msg);
330: 			break;
331: 
332: 		// ─── Permissions & Questions ─────────────────────────────────────
333: 		case "permission_request":
334: 			handlePermissionRequest(msg, wsSend);
335: 			triggerNotifications(msg);
336: 			break;
337: 		case "permission_resolved":
338: 			handlePermissionResolved(msg);
339: 			break;
340: 		case "ask_user":
341: 			handleAskUser(msg);
342: 			triggerNotifications(msg);
343: 			break;
344: 		case "ask_user_resolved":
345: 			handleAskUserResolved(msg);
346: 			break;
347: 
348: 		// ─── UI ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
349: 		case "client_count":
350: 			setClientCount(msg.count ?? 0);
351: 			break;
352: 		case "connection_status":
353: 			handleConnectionStatus(msg);
354: 			break;
355: 		case "banner":
356: 		case "skip_permissions":
357: 		case "update_available":
358: 			handleBannerMessage(msg);
359: 			break;
360: 
361: 		// ─── History ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────
362: 		case "history_page":
363: 			// Handled by history component directly (not stored globally)
364: 			for (const fn of historyPageListeners) fn(msg);
365: 			break;
366: 
367: 		// ─── Plan Mode ───────────────────────────────────────────────────
368: 		case "plan_enter":
369: 		case "plan_exit":
370: 		case "plan_content":
371: 		case "plan_approval":
372: 			for (const fn of planModeListeners) fn(msg);
373: 			break;
374: 
375: 		// ─── File Browser ────────────────────────────────────────────────
376: 		case "file_list":
377: 		case "file_content":
378: 			for (const fn of fileBrowserListeners) fn(msg);
379: 			break;
380: 
381: 		// ─── File Changes (routed to both browser and history) ──────────
382: 		case "file_changed":
383: 			for (const fn of fileBrowserListeners) fn(msg);
384: 			for (const fn of fileHistoryListeners) fn(msg);
385: 			break;
386: 		case "file_history_result":
387: 			for (const fn of fileHistoryListeners) fn(msg);
388: 			break;
389: 
390: 		// ─── Rewind ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────
391: 		case "rewind_result":
392: 			for (const fn of rewindListeners) fn(msg);
393: 			break;
394: 
395: 		// ─── Project ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────
396: 		case "project_list":
397: 			handleProjectList(msg);
398: 			for (const fn of projectListeners) fn(msg);
399: 			break;
400: 
401: 		// ─── Todo ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
402: 		// Todo messages are handled as tool_start/tool_result
403: 		// (the TodoWrite tool result contains JSON parsed by the todo component)
404: 
405: 		// ─── Part / Message removal ──────────────────────────────────────
406: 		case "part_removed":
407: 			handlePartRemoved(msg);
408: 			break;
409: 		case "message_removed":
410: 			handleMessageRemoved(msg);
411: 			break;
412: 
413: 		default:
414: 			// Unknown message type — log for debugging
415: 			// Cast needed: import.meta.env is Vite-specific, not in standard tsconfig
416: 			if ((import.meta as { env?: { DEV?: boolean } }).env?.DEV) {
417: 				console.debug("[ws] Unhandled message type:", msg.type, msg);
418: 			}
419: 			break;
420: 	}
421: }
422: 
423: // ─── Event Replay (session switch with cached events) ────────────────────────
424: // Replays raw events through existing chat handlers — identical code paths
425: // as live streaming. Zero conversion, full fidelity, handles mid-stream.
426: 
427: function replayEvents(events: RelayMessage[]): void {
428: 	chatState.replaying = true;
429: 	for (const event of events) {
430: 		switch (event.type) {
431: 			case "user_message":
432: 				addUserMessage(event.text);
433: 				break;
434: 			case "delta":
435: 				handleDelta(event);
436: 				break;
437: 			case "done":
438: 				handleDone(event);
439: 				break;
440: 			case "tool_start":
441: 				handleToolStart(event);
442: 				break;
443: 			case "tool_executing":
444: 				handleToolExecuting(event);
445: 				break;
446: 			case "tool_result":
447: 				handleToolResult(event);
448: 				break;
449: 			case "result":
450: 				handleResult(event);
451: 				break;
452: 			case "thinking_start":
453: 				handleThinkingStart(event);
454: 				break;
455: 			case "thinking_delta":
456: 				handleThinkingDelta(event);
457: 				break;
458: 			case "thinking_stop":
459: 				handleThinkingStop(event);
460: 				break;
461: 			case "status":
462: 				handleStatus(event);
463: 				break;
464: 			case "error":
465: 				handleError(event);
466: 				break;
467: 			// Skip: session_switched, permission_*, session_list, etc.
468: 			// These are not part of the chat message stream.
469: 		}
470: 	}
471: 	// Flush any pending debounced render (for mid-stream sessions
472: 	// where no "done" event has been received yet)
473: 	flushPendingRender();
474: 	chatState.replaying = false;
475: }
476: 
477: // ─── Error handler (needs special routing) ──────────────────────────────────
478: 
479: function handleChatError(msg: Extract<RelayMessage, { type: "error" }>): void {
480: 	const code = msg.code;
481: 
482: 	// PTY-related errors
483: 	if (code === "PTY_CONNECT_FAILED" || code === "HANDLER_ERROR") {
484: 		handlePtyError(msg);
485: 		return;
486: 	}
487: 
488: 	// Chat errors
489: 	handleError(msg);
490: }
491: 
492: // ─── Connection status handler ──────────────────────────────────────────────
493: 
494: const CONNECTION_BANNER_ID = "opencode-connection-status";
495: 
496: function handleConnectionStatus(
497: 	msg: Extract<RelayMessage, { type: "connection_status" }>,
498: ): void {
499: 	if (msg.status === "connected") {
500: 		removeBanner(CONNECTION_BANNER_ID);
501: 	} else {
502: 		const text =
503: 			msg.status === "reconnecting"
504: 				? "Reconnecting to OpenCode…"
505: 				: "OpenCode server disconnected";
506: 		// Remove first so text updates if status changes (e.g. disconnected → reconnecting)
507: 		removeBanner(CONNECTION_BANNER_ID);
508: 		showBanner({
509: 			id: CONNECTION_BANNER_ID,
510: 			variant: "warning",
511: 			icon: "alert-triangle",
512: 			text,
513: 			dismissible: false,
514: 		});
515: 	}
516: }
517: 
518: // ─── Banner handler ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
519: 
520: function handleBannerMessage(msg: RelayMessage): void {
521: 	switch (msg.type) {
522: 		case "update_available":
523: 			showBanner({
524: 				id: "update-available",
525: 				variant: "update",
526: 				icon: "arrow-up-circle",
527: 				text: `Update available: ${msg.version ?? "new version"}`,
528: 				dismissible: true,
529: 				version: msg.version,
530: 			});
531: 			break;
532: 		case "skip_permissions":
533: 			showBanner({
534: 				id: "skip-permissions",
535: 				variant: "skip-permissions",
536: 				icon: "shield-off",
537: 				text: "Permissions are being skipped",
538: 				dismissible: true,
539: 			});
540: 			break;
541: 		case "banner":
542: 			showBanner({
543: 				id: msg.config.id ?? "custom",
544: 				variant:
545: 					(msg.config.variant as
546: 						| "update"
547: 						| "onboarding"
548: 						| "skip-permissions"
549: 						| "warning") ?? "onboarding",
550: 				icon: msg.config.icon ?? "info",
551: 				text: msg.config.text ?? "",
552: 				dismissible: msg.config.dismissible ?? true,
553: 			});
554: 			break;
555: 	}
556: }

<script lang="ts">
	import type { ToolMessage } from "../../types.js";
	import { wsSend } from "../../stores/ws.svelte.js";
	import Icon from "../shared/Icon.svelte";

	let { message }: { message: ToolMessage } = $props();
	let expanded = $state(false);
	let loadingFullContent = $state(false);

	function formatKB(length: number): string {
		return (length / 1024).toFixed(1) + " KB";
	}

	function requestFullContent() {
		loadingFullContent = true;
		wsSend({ type: "get_tool_content", toolId: message.id });
	}

	// Clear loading state when full content arrives (isTruncated becomes false)
	$effect(() => {
		if (!message.isTruncated) {
			loadingFullContent = false;
		}
	});
